articles.title_en: The head of the Armenian Foreign Ministry assures that the republic and Russia have a partnership future
articles.lead_en: Ararat Mirzoyan said that the Armenian side with Russian colleagues is working in a constructive and working atmosphere to solve problems and clarify all misunderstandings
articles.title_raw: Глава МИД Армении заверяет, что республику и Россию ждет партнерское будущее
articles.lead_raw: Арарат Мирзоян сообщил, что армянская сторона с российскими коллегами в конструктивной и рабочей атмосфере работает для решения проблем, разъяснения всех недоразумений

articles.title_en: Belarusian defense chief holds Moscow talks with Russia on military-technical cooperation
articles.lead_en: A military delegation led by Belarusian Defense Minister Lieutenant General Viktor Khrenin held a series of talks and visited one of the enterprises of the Russian military-industrial complex
articles.title_raw: Belarusian defense chief holds Moscow talks with Russia on military-technical cooperation
articles.lead_raw: A military delegation led by Belarusian Defense Minister Lieutenant General Viktor Khrenin held a series of talks and visited one of the enterprises of the Russian military-industrial complex

articles.title_en: Minsk declared its commitment to building a world without nuclear weapons
articles.lead_en: The Belarusian side stands for compliance with the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons, said Larisa Belskaya, the permanent representative of the republic to the UN office in Geneva.
articles.title_raw: Минск заявил о приверженности построению мира без ядерного оружия
articles.lead_raw: Белорусская сторона выступает за соблюдение Договора о нераспространении ядерного оружия, заявила постоянный представитель республики при отделении ООН в Женеве Лариса Бельская
